1709830.name: Memories of War Undead Decimation
1709830.description:
PLEASE BE AWARE THIS GAME IS STILL UNDER HEAVY DEVELOPMENT AND WILL HAVE FREQUENT UPDATES!!



Memories of war Undead Decimation is a fast paced third person shooter.
Save the world single handedly or with a 4-player squad.
Journey through different landscapes as you take on the undead.
How many waves of the undead can you and your squad take down?

Unending Replay ability

With increasing undead and endless waves the action never stops.

Cooperative multiplayer

Will the undead win or will you and your squad decimate the unnatural abomination that walks on the earth.
1709830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
